from __future__ import annotations


def extract_observability_context(context: dict[str, str]) -> tuple[str, str]:
    return context.get("trace_id", "missing"), context.get("correlation_id", "missing")


def observability_context_extracted_manually_at_many_call_sites_negative(context: dict[str, str]) -> tuple[str, str]:
    return extract_observability_context(context)
